---
title: Experimental notebook
format:
  gfm:
    preview-mode: raw
---

This is an experimental notebook


```{r}
# This is a code cell
library(MASS)
```

We're going to do some stuff

```{r}
x <- runif(100)
y <- runif(100)

plot(
    x, y,
    xlab = "A variable",
    ylab = "Another variable"
)

abline(h = 0.5, v = 0.9)
```

```{r}
mean(x)
```
